rule.title: Forbid `.only` in test calls (declarative — S2-A pilot)

check.message: remove .only — it silently disables sibling tests

rulesMdTemplate:
## {{id}} — Forbid `.only` in test calls

**Stack:** react-next  
**Check:** declarative `no-restricted-syntax` (eslint-restricted engine)  
**Why:** `.only` silently disables all other tests in the file/suite. A CI run with `.only` committed will pass while skipping the vast majority of tests — a systematic false-positive gate. Remove `.only` or use `--testNamePattern` for focused local runs.
